title: SICKO MODE
meaning_summary: This track pairs a memorable hook with strong cultural recall, which helps explain its staying power and long-tail commercial value.
revenue_drivers: Catalog streaming remains the main long-tail driver for recognizable rap tracks.
Playlist placement and cultural recall help the song stay active.
Sampling, sync use, and short-form rediscovery can extend earnings.

earnings.assumptions: Estimate models streaming-era rap scale, superstar features, playlist demand, and multi-writer publishing splits.

ownership.master_owner: Major-label distributed master with artist-side participation
ownership.publishing_owner: Publishing appears split across multiple writers, producers, and publishers
ownership.catalog_sale_status: No song-specific catalog sale adjustment is assumed
ownership.notes: Modeled annual range based on streaming and catalog behavior, not a public royalty statement.
